body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #1177

Move most of the driver code after package imports and includes into one function. Also move the `solve_coupler!` function outside of it.

The `use_coupler_diagnostics` flag is now used to determine if any diagnostics are output (default diagnostics, debug plots, leaderboard, and conservation), whereas before the leaderboard and conservation were independent. This makes it easier to turn off all diagnostics with one flag. The leaderboard and conservation flags can still be used to control output of those diagnostics if `use_coupler_diagnostics == true`.

### Content
- [x] wrap everything after the config file read in a function `setup_and_run`
- [x] move the `solve_coupler!` function outside to avoid closure
- [x] `use_coupler_diagnostics` turns off all diagnostics
- [x] verify no behavioral changes
title: add wrapper function to driver

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
In #1163 I changed the path of the atmos standalone driver, but didn't update the reference to it in tests. This made the benchmark runs fail in https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-cpu-gpu-benchmarks/builds/221, and would make the atmos standalone longrun fail too. This PR fixes the paths
title: fix atmos standalone paths
